objective: Repair the Scene Generator script to generate scenes one at a time with proper format validation and pass the failing unit tests
successCriteria: Generate scenes individually in a loop rather than all at once
Pass handles_malformed_script_plan test with correct fallback format
Pass fixes_scene_format_issues test with proper scene validation
Maintain existing structure and error handling patterns
constraints: Must preserve existing input/output annotations and function signature
Must implement explicit per-scene iteration as requested
Must return properly formatted JSON string output
